testcase.name: test_get_feedback_requires_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_feedback_marketplace.py:60: in test_get_feedback_requires_admin assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for non-admin, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for non-admin, got 200: {"success":true,"data":[{"id":"ef86f740-7fe9-4b0e-91f6-c3285a328af5","type":"testimonial","message":"testt","rating":0,"user_id":"3022d23d-11a1-4fbb-849a-0cddb379d65f","user_email":"jcuradeau.7@gmail.com","user_name":"Mike price","status":"new","created_at":"2026-03-12T16:56:27.867976+00:00"},{"id":"c369c5d2-1c26-4236-8027-370d27b91a97","type":"feature","message":"TEST_Add portfolio tracking across multiple exchanges","rating":null,"user_id":"3022d23d-11a1-4fbb-849a-0cddb379d65f","user_email":"jcuradeau.7@gmail.com","user_name":"Mike price","status":"new","created_at":"2026-03-12T13:37:45.446287+00:00"},{"id":"89a1681f-cdbf-40a3-80ed-feef64360b4d","type":"bug","message":"TEST_Button on home screen doesn't respond on first click","rating":null,"user_id":"3022d23d-11a1-4fbb-849a-0cddb379d65f","user_email":"jcuradeau.7@gmail.com","user_name":"Mike price","status":"new","created_at":"2026-03-12T13:37:45.015218+00:00"},{"id":"9f97b849-0ce3-4a8e-8693-5d7b6c3b04d4","type":"improvement","message":"TEST_Would love to see more charts in the market view","rating":null,"user_id":"3022d23d-11a1-4fbb-849a-0cddb379d65f","user_email":"jcuradeau.7@gmail.com","user_name":"Mike price","status":"new","created_at":"2026-03-12T13:37:44.579102+00:00"},{"id":"d6ef4bfb-dfa2-4eb7-b20a-50fc7a11f777","type":"testimonial","message":"TEST_Great app for learning crypto! testcase.name: test_patch_feedback_requires_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_feedback_marketplace.py:180: in test_patch_feedback_requires_admin assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got 404 E assert 404 == 403 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
